completed_work: Added tests for provider default, explicit zero, stable JSON formatting, and requiring --latest-context.
Verified smoke CLI output and full pytest suite: 200 passed.
key_decisions: Expose resolved provider latest-context policy as a compact CLI audit output.
Keep the audit scoped to provider CLIs and require --latest-context.
Represent the warning-cap source explicitly as explicit, provider_default, or unset.
next_actions: Consider whether context policy metadata should also be saved into provider comparison artifacts when --latest-context is used.
risks: Policy audit output must stay aligned with resolve_provider_warning_admission_cap if provider default rules change.
summary_text: AI-Lab added compact provider latest-context policy audit output. scripts/ask_provider.py and scripts/compare_providers.py now support --print-context-policy when --latest-context is enabled. The audit output prints stable JSON showing context_policy=latest_context, require_admission, resolved max_warning_admissions, and max_warning_admissions_source. The source field distinguishes explicit CLI values, the provider default used when --require-admission is enabled and the cap is omitted, and unset policy when admission is not required and no cap is supplied. This lets operators inspect provider latest-context admission policy before prompt construction or provider calls. Full test suite passed with 200 tests.
